reviews.comment:
No es un lugar para comer definitivamente, si te pediste un sándwich de jamón y queso solo viene pan, y una feta de jamón y otra de queso, la atención tampoco fue una maravilla y los precios son mayormente regular, excepto los cubanitos, bastante caros.

(Translated by Google)
It's definitely not a place to eat. If you order a ham and cheese sandwich, it only comes with bread, a slice of ham, and a slice of cheese. The service wasn't great either, and the prices are mostly average, except for the Cubanitos, which are quite expensive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNteVptSEVREAE

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio, súper completa y muy concurrida, situada justo antes de la subida a la Autopista 7 camino a Buenos Aires, con un Restaurante.

A very busy, fully equipped service station located just before the entrance to Highway 7 on the way to Buenos Aires, with a restaurant.

reviews.comment:
Los precios mas CAROS del pais. Ojo. Te afanan. Encima no pude pasar mi descuento pagando con la aplicacion. El playero tampoco se esforzó mucho en explicarme cual era el motivo por el cual no se podia pagar con la ap d YPF.  Fue el Domingo 19/12/21 a las 21hs

(Translated by Google)
The most expensive prices in the country. Beware. They'll rip you off. On top of that, I couldn't use my discount when paying with the app. The attendant didn't make much of an effort to explain why I couldn't pay with the YPF app. It was Sunday, December 19, 2021, at 9 PM.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtMXViZVZBEAE

reviews.comment:
